title: read_market_pattern result
summary: Brent 118.26 (2026-05-01), WTI 109.76 (2026-05-04), VIX 17.19 (2026-05-08), S&P 500 7412.84 (2026-05-11); cross-asset pattern supports controlled risk premium, not closure pricing.

result.caveat: Market data is evidence input only; it must not act as a second forecast engine or independently raise closure probability.
